parameters.command:
cd /home/phil/palanthai && /home/phil/venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json, sys, uuid, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv('/home/phil/palanthai/config/.env')
import psycopg2
from psycopg2.extras import execute_values

unit = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())

def uuid5(url):
    ns = uuid.UUID('6ba7b811-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8')
    return str(uuid.uuid5(ns, url))

conn = psycopg2.connect(os.getenv('VPS_PG_URL'))
cur = conn.cursor()

execute_values(cur, '''INSERT INTO units (id, project_id, fazwaz_unit_id, property_type, bedrooms, bathrooms, floor_area_sqm, plot_size_sqm, floor_number, price_thb, price_per_sqm_thb, ownership_type, foreign_quota_available, furnishing, view_type, district, subdistrict, province, latitude, longitude, cam_fee_thb, developer_name, construction_status, nearest_landmark, building_name, listed_by, features, images, primary_image_url, source_url, data_quality_score, scraped_at) VALUES %s ON CONFLICT (fazwaz_unit_id) DO UPDATE SET price_thb=EXCLUDED.price_thb, price_per_sqm_thb=EXCLUDED.price_per_sqm_thb, images=EXCLUDED.images, data_quality_score=EXCLUDED.data_quality_score, scraped_at=EXCLUDED.scraped_at, updated_at=now()''', [(
    uuid5(unit['unit_url']), uuid5(unit.get('project_url','unknown')),
    unit['unit_id'], unit.get('property_type','condo'),
    unit.get('bedrooms'), unit.get('bathrooms'), unit.get('floor_area_sqm'), unit.get('plot_size_sqm'),
    unit.get('floor_number'), unit['sale_price_thb'], unit.get('price_per_sqm_thb'),
    unit.get('ownership'), unit.get('ownership')=='foreign_quota',
    unit.get('furnishing'), unit.get('view_type'), unit.get('district'), unit.get('subdistrict'), unit['province'],
    unit.get('latitude'), unit.get('longitude'), unit.get('cam_fee_thb'),
    unit.get('developer'), unit.get('construction_status'), unit.get('nearest_landmark'), unit.get('building_name'),
    unit.get('listed_by'), json.dumps(unit.get('features',[])), json.dumps(unit.get('images',[])),
    unit['images'][0] if unit.get('images') else None,
    unit['unit_url'], unit.get('data_quality_score',70), unit.get('scraped_at')
)])
conn.commit()
cur.close()
conn.close()
print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'unit_id': unit['unit_id']}))
" <<< '={{ JSON.stringify($json.unit) }}'

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, unit_id: $json.unit.unit_id, message: 'Unit synced to Supabase + Qdrant' }) }}
